---
title: "R Scribbles"
author: "Anurag (bmat2508@isibang.ac.in)"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(viridisLite)
```

```{r}
x=rnorm(100)
mean(x)
#Can we quantify how far is my estimator from the true value?
cifn=function(x,alpha=0.95){
    z=qnorm((1-alpha)/2,lower.tail=FALSE)
    sdx=sqrt(1/length(x))
    c(mean(x)-z*sdx,mean(x)+z*sdx)
}
i=0
while(i<10){
    x=rnorm(100)
    i=i+1
    y=cifn(x)
    print(y)
}
#Another way of doing it
normaldata=replicate(10,rnorm(100),simplify=FALSE)
cidata=sapply(normaldata,cifn)
TRUEIN=cidata[1,]*cidata[2,]<0
table(TRUEIN)
require(ggplot2)
df=data.frame(x=1:10,z1=cidata[1,],z2=cidata[2,])
```

```{r}



```
